strongest_matches: AI/ML background with hands-on model training (HuggingFace/PyTorch) and AI agent experience (Archilles, Haxaml) aligns with Faculty's AI-first mission
Strong Python backend engineering (Vigilis, Bucca Hut, Pharmax) matches the Python/Go requirement
Building production-grade systems and working with cross-functional teams mirrors the collaborative platform role
major_gaps: No professional Docker and Kubernetes orchestration experience, which is central to this platform role
Missing hands-on Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform, CloudFormation) and multi-cloud deployment experience
result.summary: Faculty's Software Engineer - Platform role is a good fit for Arinze's Python and AI engineering background, but missing direct Kubernetes and IaaC experience pulls the score down. Worth applying if he can demonstrate infrastructure familiarity.
